PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 18, 2003 is admitted to probate. Tony Tah-Paw Fang is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
